questions: how to get rid of stuff?
answers: Decluttering means removing unnecessary items from your space to create order. Start with one area at a time, sort items into keep/donate/trash piles, and be honest about what you actually use.
Room gochate prothome sob jinish ber koro, then category wise sort koro. Jeta last 6 months e use koroni seta donate koro. Storage boxes ar labels use koro.
The KonMari method by Marie Kondo says: hold each item and ask 'does this spark joy?' If yes, keep it. If no, thank it and let it go. It helps you keep only meaningful items.
Decluttering tips: do it in small sessions (15-30 minutes), take before and after photos for motivation, one in one out rule (buy something new, remove something old), and maintain regularly.
